snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! Two New Brawlers, TONS of Skins, and a New Game mode!?
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚ÄĒ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Gonzaga vs. UCLA - Final Four NCAA tournament extended highlights
snippet.description:
Gonzaga held on in the final seconds of overtime after a clutch three-point buzzer-beating bucket by Jalen Suggs to send the Bulldogs to the National Championship Game. The Zags had all five starters in double-figures, led by Drew Timme with 25 points and Joel Ayayi with 22 points and 6 boards. Watch the full game highlights.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy ‚Äď Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max ‚Äď July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie‚Äč
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/‚Äč
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/‚Äč
-----------------

Welcome to the Jam!  NBA champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy,‚ÄĚ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.‚Äôs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you‚Äôve never seen them before.  It‚Äôs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron‚Äôs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even ‚ÄúKing‚ÄĚ James by playing the game their own way.
James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the ‚ÄúAvengers‚ÄĚ films, ‚ÄúHotel Rwanda‚ÄĚ), Khris Davis (‚ÄúJudas and the Black Messiah,‚ÄĚ TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúAtlanta‚ÄĚ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Walking Dead,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Trek: Discovery‚ÄĚ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚ÄĚ) and Eric Bauza (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚ÄĚ).
Lee (‚ÄúGirls Trip,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúNight School‚ÄĚ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film‚Äôs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.
The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Homecoming‚ÄĚ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúWonder Park‚ÄĚ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúThe Mule‚ÄĚ), Akin McKenzie (Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhen They See Us‚ÄĚ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming ‚ÄúEternals‚ÄĚ), editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Episode VIII ‚Äď The Last Jedi‚ÄĚ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (‚ÄúRampage,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWar for the Planet of the Apes‚ÄĚ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreenbook,‚ÄĚ Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúBridgerton‚ÄĚ).
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy.‚ÄĚ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

Credits not final / subject to change

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ūüĎÄ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent‚Äôs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: THE SUICIDE SQUAD - Rebellion Trailer
snippet.description:
Thought you might like this too. #TheSuicideSquad
 
https://www.facebook.com/thesuicidesquad
https://www.instagram.com/thesuicidesquad
https://twitter.com/SuicideSquadWB
https://www.thesuicidesquad.com
 
From writer/director James Gunn comes Warner Bros. Pictures‚Äô superhero action adventure ‚ÄúThe Suicide Squad,‚ÄĚ featuring a collection of the most degenerate delinquents in the DC lineup.
 
Welcome to hell‚ÄĒa.k.a. Belle Reve, the prison with the highest mortality rate in the US of A.  Where the worst Super-Villains are kept and where they will do anything to get out‚ÄĒeven join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X.  Today‚Äôs do-or-die assignment?  Assemble a collection of cons, including Bloodsport, Peacemaker, Captain Boomerang, Ratcatcher 2, Savant, King Shark, Blackguard, Javelin and everyone‚Äôs favorite psycho, Harley Quinn.  Then arm them heavily and drop them (literally) on the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.  Trekking through a jungle teeming with militant adversaries and guerrilla forces at every turn, the Squad is on a search-and-destroy mission with only Colonel Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave‚Ä¶and Amanda Waller‚Äôs government techies in their ears, tracking their every movement.  And as always, one wrong move and they‚Äôre dead (whether at the hands of their opponents, a teammate, or Waller herself).  If anyone‚Äôs laying down bets, the smart money is against them‚ÄĒall of them. 
 
The film stars Margot Robbie (‚ÄúBirds of Prey,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúBombshell‚ÄĚ), Idris Elba (‚ÄúAvengers: Infinity War‚ÄĚ), John Cena (upcoming HBO Max series ‚ÄúPeacemaker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúBumblebee‚ÄĚ), Joel Kinnaman (‚ÄúSuicide Squad‚ÄĚ), Jai Courtney (the ‚ÄúDivergent‚ÄĚ franchise), Peter Capaldi (‚ÄúWorld War Z,‚ÄĚ BBC‚Äôs ‚ÄúDoctor Who‚ÄĚ ), David Dastmalchian (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúAnt-Man and the Wasp‚ÄĚ), Daniela Melchior (‚ÄúParque Mayer‚ÄĚ), Michael Rooker (the ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy‚ÄĚ films), Alice Braga (‚ÄúElysium‚ÄĚ), Pete Davidson (‚ÄúThe King of Staten Island,‚ÄĚ TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúSaturday Night Live‚ÄĚ), Joaqu√≠n Cosio (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse,‚ÄĚ TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúNarcos: Mexico‚ÄĚ), Juan Diego Botto (‚ÄúThe Europeans‚ÄĚ), Storm Reid (‚ÄúThe Invisible Man,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúA Wrinkle in Time‚ÄĚ, ‚ÄúEuphoria‚ÄĚ), Nathan Fillion (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy,‚ÄĚ TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Rookie‚ÄĚ), Steve Agee (‚ÄúBrightburn,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2‚ÄĚ), Sean Gunn (the ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy‚ÄĚ films, the ‚ÄúAvengers‚ÄĚ films), Mayling Ng (‚ÄúWonder Woman‚ÄĚ), Flula Borg (‚ÄúRalph Breaks the Internet‚ÄĚ), Jennifer Holland (‚ÄúBrightburn,‚ÄĚ upcoming HBO Max series ‚ÄúPeacemaker‚ÄĚ) and Tinashe Kajese (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúValor,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Inspectors‚ÄĚ), with Sylvester Stallone (the ‚ÄúRocky,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúRambo‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúExpendables‚ÄĚ franchises), and Viola Davis (‚ÄúMa Rainey‚Äôs Black Bottom,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSuicide Squad‚ÄĚ).
 
Gunn (the ‚ÄúGuardian of the Galaxy‚ÄĚ films) directs from his own screenplay, based on characters from DC.  The film is produced by Charles Roven and Peter Safran, with Zack Snyder, Deborah Snyder, Walter Hamada, Chantal Nong Vo, Nikolas Korda and Richard Suckle executive producing.
 
Gunn‚Äôs creative team includes director of photography Henry Braham (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2‚ÄĚ), production designer Beth Mickle (‚ÄúCaptain Marvel‚ÄĚ), editors Fred Raskin (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúOnce Upon a Time‚Ä¶ In Hollywood‚ÄĚ) and Christian Wagner (the ‚ÄúFast & Furious‚ÄĚ films) and Oscar-nominated costume designer Judianna Makovsky (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol 2,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúAvengers: Endgame,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúHarry Potter and the Sorcerer‚Äôs Stone‚ÄĚ).  The music is by John Murphy (‚ÄúKick-Ass‚ÄĚ).
 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents An Atlas Entertainment/Peter Safran Production, A James Gunn Film, ‚ÄúThe Suicide Squad.‚ÄĚ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It is set for release nationwide in theaters and IMAX on August 6, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Phoenix Wright VS Saul Goodman - EPIC PIXEL BATTLE [ EPB SAISON 4 ]
snippet.description:
‚ôę Bien qu'habitu√©s √† la d√©fense, ces deux avocats partent √† l'attaque !! La saison 4 d' Epic Pixel Battle continue, qui seront les coupabl...prochains ?

‚§Ķ Soutiens les EPB sur tipeee et uTip : 
https://www.tipeee.com/epic-pixel-battle
https://utip.io/epicpixelbattle

Du clash, du son, des pixels, vous √™tes bien sur un #EpicPixelBattle !
Un v√©ritable duel √† la barre entre deux avocats de la d√©fense : Saul Goodman (Breaking Bad et Better Call Saul) VS Phoenix Wright (Ace Attorney).
Le jeu vid√©o, voir le visual novel, se frotte directement √† l'univers de la s√©rie.
On ne vous autorise pas √† passer le g√©n√©rique !! On est pas sur Netflix non mais...

‚Ė∂ REJOINS LES EPBS !

Sur Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/EpicPixelBattle
Sur TWITTER : https://twitter.com/epicpixelbattle

Posts exclusifs, news, teasers, images etc... Rejoignez-nous et invitez des amis =D

‚Ė∂ Participants

Concepteur de l'√©mission, voix de Phoenix Wright et √† l'√©criture du battle : @123Lunatic 
Sa cha√ģne : http://bit.ly/1ratYwW

A la musique et voix de Saul Goodman : @Stan Dusk 
Sa cha√ģne : https://www.youtube.com/c/standusk

Sa cha√ģne : https://www.youtube.com/user/Sumashu

A la r√©alisation des d√©cors : JennyMiki
Son Twitter : https://twitter.com/JennyMiki_

Son Twitter : https://twitter.com/KerriSama

En Aide √† la documentation et √† l'√©criture : Ermite Moderne

Logo fait par :
Dogmotif : http://dogmotif.tumblr.com
Nekozneko : https://twitter.com/nekoznekoVEVO

Et voil√† une affaire r√©gl√©e ! Vous en √™tes les juges maintenant.
Partagez le battle si √ßa vous a plu, proposez de nouveaux battles dans les commentaires et n'h√©sitez pas aussi √† nous dire que vous l'avez aim√©, par un commentaire ou bien ne serait-ce qu'un petit like. Ca aide toujours !

‚Ė∂ ‚ôę Version Instrumentale Ici : https://youtu.be/tHQdbKEK8d4

‚Ė∂ Dans Ton Clash : (un peu plus tard!)

‚Ė∂ Remerciements

Un immense merci √† tous les contributeurs du Ulule !
Toutes les contreparties ont √©t√© envoy√©es, n'h√©sitez pas √† checker les derni√®res News Ulule.

Merci √† tous d'√™tre encore pr√©sents, toujours supers chauds !
On a h√Ęte que l'actualit√© se calme et de pouvoir vous retrouver en convention, en vrai.
En attendant, on se fait des petits lives de temps en temps, et c'est d√©j√† super cool !
Tiens d'ailleurs, playlist des lives pass√©s si vous voulez : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLJvGS6FKHzccQpq2SxoAoJaJdr_GN1KNp

Encore et toujours merci √† Nice Peter et Epic LLOYD pour l'inspiration qu'ils nous ont donn√©e avec leurs EPIC RAP BATTLES OF HISTORY !!!

snippet.title: Starship | SN11 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, March 30, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 11 (SN11) ‚Äď our fourth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN11 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN11 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN11‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs fourth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.description:
Lancement du StarShip SN11 de SpaceX qui effectuera un vol historique √† 10km d'altitude avant de se reposer √† la verticale. 
Pour ne louper aucun lancement abonne toi √† ma cha√ģne ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/1OuvrcM (merci ! )

Envie de soutenir la cha√ģne ?

* Envie d'un tee-shirt ou d'un mug UFOTINIK ? ‚Ėļ https://teespring.com/fr/stores/ufotinik

Venez discuter avec les autres abonn√©s sur le discord  ‚Ėļhttps://discord.gg/36z2xFm

Mes r√©seaux sociaux:
‚Ėļ Instagram : https://instagram.com/ufotinik
‚Ėļ Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/Chris-Enfest...
‚Ėļ Twitter : https://twitter.com/ufotinik

Starship est une fus√©e dont l‚Äôobjectif est d‚Äôamener l‚ÄôHomme sur Mars. Elle est d√©velopp√©e par la soci√©t√© d‚ÄôElon Musk: SpaceX. 
Starship est compos√© de deux √©tages.

Le premier √©tage appel√© Super Heavy et la second √©tage Starship. Ce lanceur orbital super lourd a une particularit√© tr√®s forte car il sera enti√®rement r√©utilisable ! Cela veut dire que, non seulement le premier √©tage Super Heavy sera r√©cup√©r√©, et c‚Äôest une technologie qu‚Äôon peut voir avec la Falcon 9 de SpaceX, mais √©galement que le deuxi√®me √©tage Starship sera r√©cup√©r√©. Starship poss√®de plusieurs configurations. C‚Äôest un syst√®me de transport de charge lourde (comme des satellites ou du carburants) mais aussi une capsule pour aller sur la station spatiale, un atterrisseur lunaire et un atterrisseur martien ! C‚Äôest quand m√™me dingue ! Ha et j'oubliais, SpaceX pr√©voit √©galement d‚Äôutiliser un Starship pour faire un saut en haute atmosph√®re pour rendre accessibles n‚Äôimporte qu‚Äôelle point de la terre en 30 minutes.

Starship: 
* Hauteur: 50 m 
* Diam√®tre: 9 m
* Masse au d√©collage: 1200 tonnes
* √Čtage: 1 
* Base de lancement: Pad A Boca Chica (Texas)
* Destination: 10 km et retour sur Terre. 

Motorisation : 
* Ergols (Oxyg√®ne liquide / M√©thane liquide)
* 6 Raptor (3 pour ce lancement)

√Čcris en commentaire. " Ufotinik le Starship de YouTube ! " si tu lis √ßa.

Cr√©dits (diffus√© avec l'autorisation des personnes) :
Live Starship Spadre : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDkP5NWUhfHXZNhcGr2G2pQ

snippet.title: I Fell in Love in the Plane - Episode 1 : The Encounter
snippet.description:
The story of one of the most unforgettable night of my entire life.

Written & Directed by : Kevin Tran
Produced by : Drawsome Studio

Character Designer : Fanny Antigny (@lesdessinsdefa)
Script Doctor : Laneret
Production Coordinator : Mehdi Ben Naamane

Animation by : D6D Studio
Producer : S√©bastien Dohogne
Storyboard : Malec (@malecandco) & Sandrine Mortehan
Animation/backgrounds/3D & compositing : 
Kenny Dozo, Beno√ģt Vondenhoff & Alexandre Brasero-Martin

Music Composer : Krono Muzik (@kronomuzik)
Editor/Graphic Designer : Kevin Matsumoto (@dianausse)

Voice Directors : 
Maxime Hoareau (@maxime.e.hoareau) 
& Victor Niverd (@victor.niverd), from Re:Take (@retakeofficiel)

Voice Actors : 
Korean bae : Genevi√®ve Doang (@genevievedoang)
The dad at the end : Henry Tran (@henrytran), he‚Äôs my brother I hate him

Recorded at : Studio Capitale (@studiocapitale)
Sound Engineer & Designer : Alix Breinl

Special thanks to Julia Bernard-Savary (@juliabsavary) 
& Ewen Le Quilliec (@ewenlq) for double checking my English.

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚ÄĚ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato‚Äôs new song, ‚ÄúDancing With The Devil‚ÄĚ: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

en.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚ÄĚ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato‚Äôs new song, ‚ÄúDancing With The Devil‚ÄĚ: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Meraih Kekuatan Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
‚ÄúKau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.‚ÄĚ
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.

Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741
